## Deck Architecture

| Act | Narrative Job | Canonical Anchor |
|---|---|---|
| 1 | Why: name the failure mode | Golden Circle, problems |
| 2 | How: define APDP as the missing capability layer | Shared language, visibility, feedback |
| 3 | What: introduce Protopipe components | Noesis, ProtoPortfolio, Composer, Storybook |
| 4 | Loop: connect work to observations | Purpose to observations to knowledge |
| 5 | Entry: show transformation path | Local AI, culture database, memory |
| 6 | Vision: state the organizational outcome | Shared organizational reality |

::: {.notes}
This is a table of contents slide, not a final content slide.
:::
